result.stdout:
Cursor MCP Monitor - Real-time monitoring of Model Context Protocol interactions

Usage:
  cursor-mcp [options]

Options:
  -l, --logs-root <path>          Root directory containing Cursor logs
  -p, --poll-interval <ms>        Polling interval in milliseconds
  -v, --verbosity <level>         Log verbosity level (debug, info, warning, error)
  -f, --log-pattern <pattern>     Log file pattern to monitor
  --filter <text>                 Filter log messages containing specific text
  --version                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

  --version                       Show version information
